'''talate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:generously|generously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:generously|generously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| talate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:talate|talate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:talatesher|talatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talatesherĂ«m|talatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:talatero|talatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:talateshĂ«|talateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talateshĂ«m|talateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitalatero|gokitalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitalateshĂ«|gokitalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalateshĂ«m|gokitalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotalankerom|gotalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotalankeshĂ«|gotalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotalankeshĂ«m|gotalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotalankeya|gotalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:talaterom|talaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talatemu|talatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:talateya|talateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitalaterom|gokitalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalatemu|gokitalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitalateya|gokitalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:talalate|talalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:talalatesher|talalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talalatesherĂ«m|talalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:talalatero|talalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:talalateshĂ«|talalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talalateshĂ«m|talalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitalalatero|gokitalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitalalateshĂ«|gokitalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalalateshĂ«m|gokitalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotalalankerom|gotalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotalalankeshĂ«|gotalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotalalankeshĂ«m|gotalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotalalankeya|gotalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:talalaterom|talalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:talalatemu|talalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:talalateya|talalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitalalaterom|gokitalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitalalatemu|gokitalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitalalateya|gokitalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠte|tĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠtesher|tĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠtero|tĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠlĂŠtero|gokitĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠlĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠterom|tĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠtemu|tĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠlĂŠteya|tĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠlĂŠterom|gokitĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠlĂŠteya|gokitĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:taflafte|taflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:taflaftesher|taflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taflaftesherĂ«m|taflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:taflaftero|taflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:taflafteshĂ«|taflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taflafteshĂ«m|taflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitaflaftero|gokitaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitaflafteshĂ«|gokitaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaflafteshĂ«m|gokitaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotaflafnkerom|gotaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotaflafnkeshĂ«|gotaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotaflafnkeshĂ«m|gotaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotaflafnkeya|gotaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:taflafterom|taflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taflaftemu|taflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:taflafteya|taflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitaflafterom|gokitaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaflaftemu|gokitaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitaflafteya|gokitaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
